blockers.label: Critical local Web3 surfaces are runtime-aligned
blockers.required_action: Set ETHERSCAN_API_KEY if Etherscan live calls are required.
blockers.automation_boundary: Do not ask the model to print or store API keys. Set the key in a local secret environment, then rerun the scan.
blockers.success_evidence: etherscan-mcp no longer appears in env_missing_tool_ids and ETHERSCAN_API_KEY presence is true.

blockers.label: Remote GitHub Actions CI has completed successfully
blockers.evidence: GitHub CLI token is missing workflow scope.
blockers.required_action: Run `gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow`, then rerun this script with `--wait`.
blockers.automation_boundary: The helper can publish and wait only after GitHub CLI auth has workflow scope.
blockers.verification_command: gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow; python3 scripts/enable_remote_ci.py --repo-root . --repo starkweng/stark-finance-trading --wait --out dist/stark-finance-trading.remote-ci-proof.json --markdown dist/stark-finance-trading.remote-ci-proof.md --json
blockers.success_evidence: remote_github_actions_run is PROVEN or PROVIDED in external proof audit.

blockers.label: Approved live model eval proof exists
blockers.required_action: Run an approved live eval, generate the review bundle, and score it after human review.
blockers.automation_boundary: Live eval prompts must be explicitly approved before sending them to a model service.
blockers.success_evidence: approved_live_model_eval is PROVEN or PROVIDED and scorecard source_mode is live/reviewed.

blockers.label: Reviewed comparative live eval proof exists
blockers.required_action: Run an approved live eval, generate the review bundle, and score it after human review.
blockers.automation_boundary: Live eval prompts must be explicitly approved before sending them to a model service.
blockers.success_evidence: reviewed_comparative_live_eval is PROVEN or PROVIDED and scorecard source_mode is live/reviewed.

next_actions.action: Set ETHERSCAN_API_KEY if Etherscan live calls are required.
Run `gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow`, then rerun this script with `--wait`.
next_actions.verify: gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow; python3 scripts/enable_remote_ci.py --repo-root . --repo starkweng/stark-finance-trading --wait --out dist/stark-finance-trading.remote-ci-proof.json --markdown dist/stark-finance-trading.remote-ci-proof.md --json

next_actions.action: Run an approved live eval, generate the review bundle, and score it after human review.
Run an approved live eval, generate the review bundle, and score it after human review.

evidence_boundary: Release blocker plan is an actionable routing artifact. PASS means the plan was generated from local audits without printing secret values. It does not prove remote GitHub Actions, live model behavior, API entitlement, market-data correctness, trading performance, or public superiority.
